title: Add Playwright E2E tests for krate web console

processLibrarySources.requestedPathStatus: Not present in this checkout at planning time.
selectedGuidance: Use ATDD/TDD outside-in acceptance criteria so Playwright tests encode the user-visible definition of done before implementation details.
Use BDD/specification-by-example to formulate concrete navigation, CRUD, provider sync, SSE, assistant, playground, and agent-flow examples.
Use QA testing automation guidance for maintainable E2E fixtures, data isolation, CI suitability, and flakiness controls.
Use web-development guidance for browser/API/auth/routing integration across the Next.js web console.

issueSummary.currentState: Commit 74a94a950 already added basic Playwright smoke coverage in packages/krate/web/e2e/smoke.spec.js, but workflows still lack browser-level E2E coverage.
issueSummary.goal: Add staging-backed Playwright tests that prove Krate web console navigation, CRUD flows, external provider sync, SSE/live updates, and service-dependent agent/assistant/playground paths work in a browser.
issueSummary.knownDependency: #608 must configure staging services before assistant, real agent dispatch, session transcript, and playground model-call tests can be fully enabled.

crudFlows.name: agent-stack-crud
crudFlows.expectedUserFlow: Create stack through the browser, verify it appears in the list/detail, edit a visible field if supported, dispatch CRD-level run when safe, then delete.

crudFlows.name: trigger-rule-crud
crudFlows.expectedUserFlow: Create trigger rule, verify list/detail, toggle enabled/disabled, then delete.

crudFlows.name: project-crud
crudFlows.expectedUserFlow: Create project, verify project detail and kanban board render, then delete.

crudFlows.name: memory-repository-crud
crudFlows.expectedUserFlow: Create memory repository, verify it appears in memory list/search context, then delete.

externalProviderFlow.expectedUserFlow: Create a provider with the wizard using isolated test data, verify provider/binding visibility, trigger sync where supported, and clean up created resources.

sseFlows.name: watch-resource-eventsource
sseFlows.expected: EventSource connects and receives an initial/event heartbeat or resource event without browser runtime errors.

sseFlows.name: agent-events-stream
sseFlows.expected: Agent EventSource stream connects or emits an auth-aware skip diagnostic; no 500 or raw runtime error.

serviceDependentFlows.name: agent-dispatch-run-session-transcript
serviceDependentFlows.expectedWhenReady: Dispatch run from stack, run appears, session is created, transcript is visible.
serviceDependentFlows.defaultBehaviorBeforeReady: Skip with explicit #608 diagnostic after proving CRD-level dispatch does not crash if that is safe.

serviceDependentFlows.name: assistant-chat
serviceDependentFlows.expectedWhenReady: Send chat message and verify assistant response renders.
serviceDependentFlows.defaultBehaviorBeforeReady: Skip with explicit #608 diagnostic; do not fail on known missing API key.

serviceDependentFlows.name: playground-model-compare
serviceDependentFlows.expectedWhenReady: Select models, send prompt, and compare responses.

authAndIsolationRequirements.auth: Use documented staging auth or Playwright storage state. If no noninteractive auth path exists, stop at the readiness breakpoint before CRUD implementation.
authAndIsolationRequirements.cleanup: Every test-created Krate resource must be deleted in afterEach/afterAll using API cleanup, even if browser assertions fail.
authAndIsolationRequirements.sharedStagingPolicy: Do not mutate resources that were not created by the current test run.

environmentVariables.KRATE_E2E_URL: Base URL for Playwright; staging default is https://krate-staging.a5c.ai.
environmentVariables.KRATE_E2E_ORG: Optional organization slug; default is default.
environmentVariables.KRATE_E2E_AUTH_STATE: Optional path to Playwright storageState for authenticated staging sessions.
environmentVariables.KRATE_E2E_ENABLE_SERVICE_FLOWS: Set to 1 only after #608 dependencies are configured.
environmentVariables.KRATE_E2E_ENABLE_MUTATING_STAGING: Set to 1 to permit CRUD tests against shared staging after auth/isolation is confirmed.

outOfScope: Do not implement issue #608 staging env vars in this process.
Do not redesign Krate web UI or resource schemas except for minimal testability hooks justified by the test plan.
Do not add destructive cleanup that deletes resources without the issue-609-e2e prefix.
Do not replace existing unit/structural tests with Playwright tests.
